title: Post Disaster Food Services * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Post Disaster Food Services * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SELF SUFFICIENCY ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE SNAP REPLACEMENT BENEFITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF ODHS might be able to replace SNAP benefits if people lost food bought with SNAP during a disaster such as storms, flooding, power outages or fire. 500 Summer Street NE E48 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Households who receive SNAP who lost or disposed of food that was unsafe to eat due to storms, flooding, power outages or fires can request that replacement benefits be issued for the cost of the food lost. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm (800) 699-9075 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SNAP REPLACEMENT BENEFITS
